channel.title: International Journal of Turbo & Jet-Engines
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Turbo & Jet-Engines

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Thuraganur V. Yogesh, Laasya P. Nidamarty, Seepana V. Ramanamurty, Sashi K. Panigrahi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tjj-2025-frontmatter1
